tossups.question: Angela Gheorghiu ("g'YORR-g'yoo") interrupted a tenor encore in a 2024 performance of this opera to say, "It's a performance. It's not a recital. Respect me." A spinto tenor remembers "sweet kisses, languorous caresses" in an aria from Act III of this opera that begins with a wistful clarinet solo. In Act I of this opera, that tenor describes the "contrasting beauties" of his lover and of a blonde woman he (*) painted as Mary Magdalene. This opera's title soprano gives a safe-conduct pass to the singer of "Recondita armonia" and "E lucevan le stelle" ("ay loo-CHAY-von lay STELL-ay"). In this opera, Baron Scarpia orders a firing squad to execute Mario Cavaradossi. For 10 points, name this Puccini opera that ends with the title diva jumping off the Castel Sant'Angelo.
tossups.question_sanitized: Angela Gheorghiu ("g'YORR-g'yoo") interrupted a tenor encore in a 2024 performance of this opera to say, "It's a performance. It's not a recital. Respect me." A spinto tenor remembers "sweet kisses, languorous caresses" in an aria from Act III of this opera that begins with a wistful clarinet solo. In Act I of this opera, that tenor describes the "contrasting beauties" of his lover and of a blonde woman he (*) painted as Mary Magdalene. This opera's title soprano gives a safe-conduct pass to the singer of "Recondita armonia" and "E lucevan le stelle" ("ay loo-CHAY-von lay STELL-ay"). In this opera, Baron Scarpia orders a firing squad to execute Mario Cavaradossi. For 10 points, name this Puccini opera that ends with the title diva jumping off the Castel Sant'Angelo.

bonuses.leadin: Angela Gheorghiu (“gay-or-GHEE-oo”) recorded an album of this composer’s “heroines,” including spinto roles often sung by Lianna Haroutounian (“hah-roo-TOON-ian”) and Sonya Yoncheva. For 10 points each:
bonuses.leadin_sanitized: Angela Gheorghiu ("gay-or-GHEE-oo") recorded an album of this composer's "heroines," including spinto roles often sung by Lianna Haroutounian ("hah-roo-TOON-ian") and Sonya Yoncheva. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this opera composer whose celebrated interpreters include Zinka Milanov as Leonora and Marina Rebeka as Violetta.

Anna Netrebko broke into heavier Verdi roles with a 2014 performance as this character, opposite Željko Lučić (“ZHAYL-koh LOO-cheech”) in the title role. Ekaterina Semenchuk has given mezzo-soprano takes on this role, who sings “Vieni t’affretta.”

The Met’s 2014 HD broadcast of Macbeth was hosted by this Georgian mezzo known for dramatic Verdi roles like Amneris and Azucena (“ah-dzoo-CHAY-na”). After she lost her voice in 2021, she was unable to play Eboli (“AY-bo-lee”) in Don Carlo.
parts_sanitized: Name this opera composer whose celebrated interpreters include Zinka Milanov as Leonora and Marina Rebeka as Violetta.

Anna Netrebko broke into heavier Verdi roles with a 2014 performance as this character, opposite Zeljko Lucic ("ZHAYL-koh LOO-cheech") in the title role. Ekaterina Semenchuk has given mezzo-soprano takes on this role, who sings "Vieni t'affretta."

The Met's 2014 HD broadcast of Macbeth was hosted by this Georgian mezzo known for dramatic Verdi roles like Amneris and Azucena ("ah-dzoo-CHAY-na"). After she lost her voice in 2021, she was unable to play Eboli ("AY-bo-lee") in Don Carlo.
answers: Giuseppe Verdi [or Giuseppe Fortunino Francesco Verdi; accept Verdi Heroines] (Leonora is from Il Trovatore, while Violetta appears in La Traviata.)
answers_sanitized: Giuseppe Verdi [or Giuseppe Fortunino Francesco Verdi; accept Verdi Heroines] (Leonora is from Il Trovatore, while Violetta appears in La Traviata.)
